title: Iceberg Logical error: 'Unexpected null _row_number'
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouses/t0', format = 'Avro');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES (1);
ALTER TABLE t0 DELETE WHERE c0 != 2; --Logical error
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:

poc: CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouses/t0', format = 'Avro');
ALTER TABLE t0 DELETE WHERE c0 != 2;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE with DELETE causes unexpected null _row_number
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id Int, name String, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test', 10.5);
CREATE TABLE t2 (ref_id Int, description Nullable(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ref_id;
INSERT INTO t2 (ref_id, description) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'example');
ALTER TABLE t1 DELETE WHERE value < 0;
